evals.prompt: Write a generateText call using claude-sonnet
evals.expected_behavior: First checks node_modules/ai/docs/ for current generateText API. Fetches current model IDs via curl to AI Gateway (does NOT guess 'claude-3-5-sonnet' from memory). Uses Vercel AI Gateway provider. Generates minimal code only specifying non-default options.
anti_patterns: Writing code directly from memory without checking docs
evals.expected: Valid, type-safe generateText call using current API from docs, model ID from live curl

evals.prompt: My project using useChat is throwing 'messages is not a function' error. How do I fix it?
evals.expected_behavior: Checks references/common-errors.md first (before searching source code). Identifies this as a known useChat breaking change. Provides correct current useChat API pattern from docs.
anti_patterns: Searching source code before checking common-errors.md
Suggesting old useChat patterns from training memory
evals.expected: Quick diagnosis from common-errors.md, correct current API from docs

evals.prompt: Add streaming AI chat to my Next.js project
evals.expected_behavior: Checks package.json to confirm Next.js. Searches node_modules/ai/docs/ for Next.js-specific quickstart pattern. Only installs 'ai' package initially; defers provider packages. Detects framework from package.json, not assumption.
evals.expected: Framework detected, minimal install, correct streaming API route + client hook from current docs

evals.prompt: Typecheck is failing: 'Property parameters does not exist on type Tool'
evals.expected_behavior: Recognizes 'parameters' as a renamed property. Checks references/common-errors.md for the rename. Finds the correct current property name (inputSchema). Does not guess.
evals.expected: Identifies rename from common-errors.md, provides correct property name and import
